'''鈭歞-z-sh-dh''' ('''kadazshedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:queazen|queazen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-z-sh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:queazen|queazen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-z-sh-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kadazshedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidazshedhoko|thidazshedhoko]] || [[word:jidazshedhoko|jidazshedhoko]] || [[word:shidazshedhoko|shidazshedhoko]] || [[word:kidazshedhoko|kidazshedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudazshedhoko|thuthudazshedhoko]] || [[word:jujudazshedhoko|jujudazshedhoko]] || [[word:shushudazshedhoko|shushudazshedhoko]] || [[word:kukudazshedhoko|kukudazshedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
